keywords.description: Search keywords used to detect relevant Nostr posts.
keywords.title: Keywords

nwc_url.description: Nostr Wallet Connect URL (`nostr+walletconnect://...`) with relay and secret.
nwc_url.title: Nwc Url

package_impacts.description: Prepaid impact package size. Allowed values: 100, 500, 1000.
package_impacts.title: Package Impacts

product_description.description: Marketing copy describing the promoted product or service.
product_description.title: Product Description

product_url.description: Public URL for the promoted product.

comment_event_id.description: Published comment event ID when available.
comment_event_id.title: Comment Event Id

source_event_id.description: Source Nostr event ID when available.

target_pubkey.description: Nostr public key of the interaction target.
target_pubkey.title: Target Pubkey

users_discarded.description: Users filtered out by trust or policy rules.
users_discarded.title: Users Discarded

nwc_url.description: NWC wallet URL to validate without changing campaign state.
nwc_url.title: Nwc Url

available_sats.description: Spendable satoshis reported by the wallet.
available_sats.title: Available Sats

checked_at.description: Timestamp when the wallet check completed.
checked_at.title: Checked At

required_sats.description: Minimum satoshis required for the campaign package.
required_sats.title: Required Sats

nwc_url.description: NWC wallet URL used when resuming the campaign.

company_name.description: Legal or display name of the company.

contact_email.description: Primary operations contact email for the company.

email.description: Login email for the first company user.
email.title: Email

password.description: Password for the first company user.
password.title: Password

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token from POST /auth/login or POST /auth/register.
